Barnyard: The Original Party Animals (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $72,779,000Details
International Box Office $45,804,844
Worldwide Box Office $118,583,844
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $67,705,377
Total $67,705,377
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,820,864 (21.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$51,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,311 opening theaters/3,311 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $132,891,124

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 4th, 2006 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: December 12th, 2006 by Paramount Home Video, released as Barnyard - The Original Party Animals
MPA Rating: PG for some mild peril and rude humor
Running Time: 90 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Plot point: Abandoned Child, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Gangs, Pregnant Women, Romance, Talking Animals, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Adopted Family, Life on a Farm
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Nickelodeon Films
Production Countries: Germany, United States
Languages: English
